title: MCIP RetrievedPassage v1
description: A specific excerpt from a LiteratureSource that was model-visible during a tracked proof-search step — its existence as a record IS the evidence the model saw it. Post-hoc findings (discovered only during later review, never shown to the model) are PriorArtMatch instead, never this — that is the structural mechanism that keeps model-visible and post-hoc evidence from being conflated. Lives in the shared literature_sources/ catalog alongside LiteratureSource.

passage_sha256.description: Hash of the exact passage text. Computed and retained even when passage_text itself is redacted, so public exports can retain the hash without the content.

retrieval_episode_id.description: episode_id of the tracked proof-search episode that retrieved this passage, if applicable — reinforces that this record represents model-visible evidence, not a post-hoc find.
